live_migration_support_notes: Live cutover requires session changesets or proxy-observed writes; otherwise use online backup/dump with exclusive final pause.
primary_method: online backup plus session changesets when enabled
initial_snapshot_or_seed: online backup API, .dump, or consistent file copy after lock/checkpoint
delta_feed_or_change_capture: session extension changesets when enabled; otherwise no native live feed
proxy_method: embedded/API bridge proxy with database/file/table readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: query polling and final exclusive write pause; live cutover refused without changesets or proxy-observed writes
required_cutover_barrier: source exclusive/final pause or changeset drained; rowid/sequence/schema mapped; integrity and row compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
